* Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more\n * contributor license agreements. See the NOTICE file distributed with\n * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.\n * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0\n * (the \"License\"); you may not use this file except in compliance with\n * the License. You may obtain a copy of the License at\n *\n *    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n *\n * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n * distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n * limitations under the License.\n */\npackage org.apache.kafka.streams.processor.internals.tasks;\n\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.KafkaFuture;\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.internals.KafkaFutureImpl;\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.utils.LogContext;\nimport org.apache.kafka.common.utils.Time;\nimport org.apache.kafka.streams.errors.StreamsException;\nimport org.apache.kafka.streams.processor.TaskId;\nimport org.apache.kafka.streams.processor.internals.ReadOnlyTask;\nimport org.apache.kafka.streams.processor.internals.StreamTask;\nimport org.apache.kafka.streams.processor.internals.Task;\nimport org.apache.kafka.streams.processor.internals.TaskExecutionMetadata;\nimport org.apache.kafka.streams.processor.internals.TasksRegistry;\n\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\n\nimport java.time.Duration;\nimport java.util.ArrayList;\nimport java.util.HashMap;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.Set;\nimport java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentSkipListSet;\nimport java.util.concurrent.locks.Condition;\nimport java.util.concurrent.locks.Lock;\nimport java.util.concurrent.locks.ReentrantLock;\nimport java.util.function.Supplier;\nimport java.util.stream.Collectors;\n\n/**\n * An active task could only be in one of the following status:\n *\n * 1. It's assigned to one of the executors for processing.\n * 2. It's locked for committing, removal, other manipulations etc.\n * 3. Neither 1 or 2, i.e. it stays idle. This is possible if we do not have enough executors or because those tasks\n *    are not processable (e.g. because no records fetched) yet.\n */\npublic final class DefaultTaskManager implements TaskManager {\n\n    private final Time time;\n    private final Logger log;\n    private final TasksRegistry tasks;\n\n    private final Lock tasksLock = new ReentrantLock();\n    private final Condition tasksCondition = tasksLock.newCondition();\n    private final List<TaskId> lockedTasks = new ArrayList<>();\n    private final Map<TaskId, StreamsException> uncaughtExceptions = new HashMap<>();\n    private final Map<TaskId, TaskExecutor> assignedTasks = new HashMap<>();\n    private final TaskExecutionMetadata taskExecutionMetadata;\n\n    private final List<TaskExecutor> taskExecutors;\n\n    public static class DefaultTaskExecutorCreator implements TaskExecutorCreator {\n        @Override\n        public TaskExecutor create(final TaskManager taskManager, final String name, final Time time, final TaskExecutionMetadata taskExecutionMetadata) {\n            return new DefaultTaskExecutor(taskManager, name, time, taskExecutionMetadata);\n        }\n    }\n\n    public DefaultTaskManager(final Time time,\n                              final String clientId,\n                              final TasksRegistry tasks,\n                              final TaskExecutorCreator executorCreator,\n                              final TaskExecutionMetadata taskExecutionMetadata,\n                              final int numExecutors\n                              ) {\n        final String logPrefix = String.format(\"%s \", clientId);\n        final LogContext logContext = new LogContext(logPrefix);\n        this.log = logContext.logger(DefaultTaskManager.class);\n        this.time = time;\n        this.tasks = tasks;\n        this.taskExecutionMetadata = taskExecutionMetadata;\n\n        this.taskExecutors = new ArrayList<>(numExecutors);\n        for (int i = 1; i <= numExecutors; i++) {\n            final String name = clientId + \"-TaskExecutor-\" + i;\n            this.taskExecutors.add(executorCreator.create(this, name, time, taskExecutionMetadata));\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public StreamTask assignNextTask(final TaskExecutor executor) {\n        return returnWithTasksLocked(() -> {\n            if (!taskExecutors.contains(executor)) {\n                throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"The requested executor for getting next task to assign is unrecognized\");\n            }\n\n            // the most naive scheduling algorithm for now: give the next unlocked, unassigned, and  processable task\n            for (final StreamTask task : tasks.activeInitializedTasks()) {\n                if (!assignedTasks.containsKey(task.id()) &&\n                    !lockedTasks.contains(task.id()) &&\n                    canProgress(task, time.milliseconds()) &&\n                    !hasUncaughtException(task.id())\n                ) {\n\n                    assignedTasks.put(task.id(), executor);\n\n                    log.debug(\"Assigned task {} to executor {}\", task.id(), executor.name());\n\n                    return task;\n                }\n            }\n\n            log.debug(\"Found no assignable task for executor {}\", executor.name());\n\n            return null;\n        });\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public void awaitProcessableTasks(final Supplier<Boolean> isShuttingDown) throws InterruptedException {\n        final boolean interrupted = returnWithTasksLocked(() -> {\n            for (final StreamTask task : tasks.activeInitializedTasks()) {\n                if (!assignedTasks.containsKey(task.id()) &&\n                    !lockedTasks.contains(task.id()) &&\n                    canProgress(task, time.milliseconds()) &&\n                    !hasUncaughtException(task.id())\n                ) {\n                    log.debug(\"Await unblocked: returning early from await since a processable task {} was found\", task.id());\n                    return false;\n                }\n            }\n            try {\n                // We re-check the shutdownRequest atomic boolean to avoid a race condition. If this thread was\n                // previously interrupted while awaiting tasksCondition, it is possible to miss the signalAll that\n                // is called during shutdown. If this happens, we end up blocking in the await forever.\n                if (!isShuttingDown.get()) {\n                    log.debug(\"Await blocking\");\n                    tasksCondition.await();\n                } else {\n                    log.debug(\"Not awaiting since shutdown was requested\");\n                }\n            } catch (final InterruptedException ignored) {\n                // we interrupt the thread for shut down and pause.\n                // we can ignore this exception.\n                log.debug(\"Await unblocked: Interrupted while waiting for processable tasks\");\n                return true;\n            }\n            log.debug(\"Await unblocked: Woken up to check for processable tasks\");\n            return false;\n        });\n\n        if (interrupted) {\n            throw new InterruptedException();\n        }\n    }\n\n    public void signalTaskExecutors() {\n        log.debug(\"Waking up task executors\");\n        executeWithTasksLocked(tasksCondition::signalAll);\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public void unassignTask(final StreamTask task, final TaskExecutor executor) {\n        executeWithTasksLocked(() -> {\n            if (!taskExecutors.contains(executor)) {\n                throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"The requested executor for unassign task is unrecognized\");\n            }\n\n            final TaskExecutor lockedExecutor = assignedTasks.get(task.id());\n            if (lockedExecutor == null || lockedExecutor != executor) {\n                throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"Task \" + task.id() + \" is not locked by the executor\");\n            }\n\n            assignedTasks.remove(task.id());\n\n            log.debug(\"Unassigned {} from executor {}\", task.id(), executor.name());\n            tasksCondition.signalAll();\n        });\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public KafkaFuture<Void> lockTasks(final Set<TaskId> taskIds) {\n        final KafkaFutureImpl<Void> result = new KafkaFutureImpl<>();\n\n        if (taskIds.isEmpty()) {\n            result.complete(null);\n            return result;\n        }\n\n        return returnWithTasksLocked(() -> {\n            lockedTasks.addAll(taskIds);\n\n            final Set<TaskId> remainingTaskIds = new ConcurrentSkipListSet<>(taskIds);\n\n            for (final TaskId taskId : taskIds) {\n                final Task task = tasks.initializedTask(taskId);\n\n                if (task == null) {\n                    throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"Trying to lock task \" + taskId + \" but it's not owned\");\n                }\n\n                if (!task.isActive()) {\n                    throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"The locking task \" + taskId + \" is not an active task\");\n                }\n\n                if (assignedTasks.containsKey(taskId)) {\n                    final TaskExecutor executor = assignedTasks.get(taskId);\n                    log.debug(\"Requesting release of task {} from {}\", taskId, executor.name());\n                    final KafkaFuture<StreamTask> future = executor.unassign();\n                    future.whenComplete((streamTask, throwable) -> {\n                        if (throwable != null) {\n                            result.completeExceptionally(throwable);\n                        } else {\n                            assert !assignedTasks.containsKey(taskId);\n                            // It can happen that the executor handed back the task before we asked it to\n                            // in which case `streamTask` will be null here.\n                            assert streamTask == null || streamTask.id() == taskId;\n                            remainingTaskIds.remove(taskId);\n                            if (remainingTaskIds.isEmpty()) {\n                                result.complete(null);\n                            }\n                        }\n                    });\n                } else {\n                    remainingTaskIds.remove(taskId);\n                    if (remainingTaskIds.isEmpty()) {\n                        result.complete(null);\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n\n            return result;\n        });\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public KafkaFuture<Void> lockAllTasks() {\n        return returnWithTasksLocked(() ->\n            lockTasks(tasks.activeInitializedTasks().stream().map(Task::id).collect(Collectors.toSet()))\n        );\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public void unlockTasks(final Set<TaskId> taskIds) {\n\n        if (taskIds.isEmpty()) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        executeWithTasksLocked(() -> {\n            lockedTasks.removeAll(taskIds);\n            log.debug(\"Waking up task executors\");\n            tasksCondition.signalAll();\n        });\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public void unlockAllTasks() {\n        executeWithTasksLocked(() -> unlockTasks(tasks.activeInitializedTasks().stream().map(Task::id).collect(Collectors.toSet())));\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public void add(final Set<StreamTask> tasksToAdd) {\n        executeWithTasksLocked(() -> {\n            for (final StreamTask task : tasksToAdd) {\n                tasks.addActiveTask(task);\n            }\n            log.debug(\"Waking up task executors\");\n            tasksCondition.signalAll();\n        });\n\n        log.info(\"Added tasks {} to the task manager to process\", tasksToAdd);\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public void remove(final TaskId taskId) {\n        executeWithTasksLocked(() -> {\n            if (assignedTasks.containsKey(taskId)) {\n                throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"The task to remove is still assigned to executors\");\n            }\n\n            if (!lockedTasks.contains(taskId)) {\n                throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"The task to remove is not locked yet by the task manager\");\n            }\n\n            if (!tasks.containsInitialized(taskId)) {\n                throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"The task to remove is not owned by the task manager\");\n            }\n\n            tasks.removeTask(tasks.initializedTask(taskId));\n        });\n\n        log.info(\"Removed task {} from the task manager\", taskId);\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public Set<ReadOnlyTask> getTasks() {\n        return returnWithTasksLocked(() -> tasks.activeInitializedTasks().stream().map(ReadOnlyTask::new).collect(Collectors.toSet()));\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public void setUncaughtException(final StreamsException exception, final TaskId taskId) {\n        executeWithTasksLocked(() -> {\n\n            if (!assignedTasks.containsKey(taskId)) {\n                throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"An uncaught exception can only be set as long as the task is still assigned\");\n            }\n\n            if (uncaughtExceptions.containsKey(taskId)) {\n                throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"The uncaught exception must be cleared before restarting processing\");\n            }\n\n            uncaughtExceptions.put(taskId, exception);\n        });\n\n        log.info(\"Set an uncaught exception of type {} for task {}, with error message: {}\",\n            exception.getClass().getName(),\n            taskId,\n            exception.getMessage());\n    }\n\n    public Map<TaskId, RuntimeException> drainUncaughtExceptions() {\n        final Map<TaskId, RuntimeException> returnValue = returnWithTasksLocked(() -> {\n            final Map<TaskId, RuntimeException> result = new HashMap<>(uncaughtExceptions);\n            uncaughtExceptions.clear();\n            return result;\n        });\n\n        if (!returnValue.isEmpty()) {\n            log.debug(\"Drained {} uncaught exceptions\", returnValue.size());\n        }\n\n        return returnValue;\n    }\n\n    public boolean hasUncaughtException(final TaskId taskId) {\n        return returnWithTasksLocked(() -> uncaughtExceptions.containsKey(taskId));\n    }\n\n    private void executeWithTasksLocked(final Runnable action) {\n        tasksLock.lock();\n        try {\n            action.run();\n        } finally {\n            tasksLock.unlock();\n        }\n    }\n\n    private <T> T returnWithTasksLocked(final Supplier<T> action) {\n        tasksLock.lock();\n        try {\n            return action.get();\n        } finally {\n            tasksLock.unlock();\n        }\n    }\n\n    private boolean canProgress(final StreamTask task, final long nowMs) {\n        return\n            taskExecutionMetadata.canProcessTask(task, nowMs) && task.isProcessable(nowMs) ||\n                taskExecutionMetadata.canPunctuateTask(task) && (task.canPunctuateStreamTime() || task.canPunctuateSystemTime());\n    }\n\n    public void startTaskExecutors() {\n        for (final TaskExecutor t: taskExecutors) {\n            t.start();\n        }\n    }\n\n    public void shutdown(final Duration duration) {\n        for (final TaskExecutor t: taskExecutors) {\n            t.requestShutdown();\n        }\n        signalTaskExecutors();\n        for (final TaskExecutor t: taskExecutors) {\n            t.awaitShutdown(duration);\n        }\n    }\n}\n","numLines":387,"startLine":1,"totalLines":387}}}

org.apache.kafka.streams.processor.internals.metrics.StreamsMetricsImpl.WINDOWED_RATIO_DESCRIPTION_PREFIX;\n\npublic class DefaultStateUpdater implements StateUpdater {\n\n    private static final String BUG_ERROR_MESSAGE = \"This indicates a bug. \" +\n        \"Please report at https://issues.apache.org/jira/projects/KAFKA/issues or to the dev-mailing list (https://kafka.apache.org/contact).\";\n\n    private class StateUpdaterThread extends Thread {\n\n        private final ChangelogReader changelogReader;\n        private final StateUpdaterMetrics updaterMetrics;\n        private final AtomicBoolean isRunning = new AtomicBoolean(true);\n        private final AtomicBoolean isIdle = new AtomicBoolean(false);\n        private final Map<TaskId, Task> updatingTasks = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();\n        private final Map<TaskId, Task> pausedTasks = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();\n\n        private final WindowedSum idleTimeWindowedSum = new WindowedSum();\n        private final WindowedSum checkpointTimeWindowedSum = new WindowedSum();\n        private final WindowedSum activeRestoreTimeWindowedSum = new WindowedSum();\n        private final WindowedSum standbyRestoreTimeWindowedSum = new WindowedSum();\n        private final WindowedSum runOnceLatencyWindowedSum = new WindowedSum();\n        private final MetricConfig metricsConfig;\n\n        private boolean timeWindowInitialized = false;\n\n        private long totalCheckpointLatency = 0L;\n\n        private volatile long fetchDeadlineClientInstanceId = -1L;\n        private volatile KafkaFutureImpl<Uuid> clientInstanceIdFuture = new KafkaFutureImpl<>();\n\n        public StateUpdaterThread(final String name,\n                                  final StreamsMetricsImpl metrics,\n                                  final ChangelogReader changelogReader) {\n            super(name);\n            this.changelogReader = changelogReader;\n            this.updaterMetrics = new StateUpdaterMetrics(metrics, name);\n            this.metricsConfig = metrics.metricsRegistry().config();\n        }\n\n        public Collection<Task> updatingTasks() {\n            return updatingTasks.values();\n        }\n\n        public Collection<StandbyTask> updatingStandbyTasks() {\n            return updatingTasks.values().stream()\n                .filter(t -> !t.isActive())\n                .map(t -> (StandbyTask) t)\n                .collect(Collectors.toList());\n        }\n\n        private boolean onlyStandbyTasksUpdating() {\n            return !updatingTasks.isEmpty() && updatingTasks.values().stream().noneMatch(Task::isActive);\n        }\n\n        public Collection<Task> pausedTasks() {\n            return pausedTasks.values();\n        }\n\n        public long numUpdatingStandbyTasks() {\n            return updatingTasks.values().stream()\n                .filter(t -> !t.isActive())\n                .count();\n        }\n\n        public long numRestoringActiveTasks() {\n            return updatingTasks.values().stream()\n                .filter(Task::isActive)\n                .count();\n        }\n\n        public long numPausedStandbyTasks() {\n            return pausedTasks.values().stream()\n                .filter(t -> !t.isActive())\n                .count();\n        }\n\n        public long numPausedActiveTasks() {\n            return pausedTasks.values().stream()\n                .filter(Task::isActive)\n                .count();\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public void run() {\n            log.info(\"State updater thread started\");\n            try {\n                initTimeWindowIfNeeded(time.milliseconds());\n                while (isRunning.get()) {\n                    runOnce();\n                }\n            } catch (final RuntimeException anyOtherException) {\n                handleRuntimeException(anyOtherException);\n            } finally {\n                clearInputQueue();\n                clearUpdatingAndPausedTasks();\n                updaterMetrics.clear();\n                log.info(\"State updater thread stopped\");\n            }\n        }\n\n        private void clearInputQueue() {\n            tasksAndActionsLock.lock();\n            try {\n                tasksAndActions.clear();\n            } finally {\n                tasksAndActionsLock.unlock();\n            }\n        }\n\n        // In each iteration:\n        //   1) check if updating tasks need to be paused\n        //   2) check if paused tasks need to be resumed\n        //   3) restore those updating tasks\n        //   4) checkpoint those updating task states\n        //   5) idle waiting if there is no more tasks to be restored\n        //\n        //   Note that, 1-3) are measured as restoring time, while 4) and 5) measured separately\n        //   as checkpointing time and idle time\n        private void runOnce() {\n            final long totalStartTimeMs = time.milliseconds();\n            performActionsOnTasks();\n\n            resumeTasks();\n            pauseTasks();\n            restoreTasks(totalStartTimeMs);\n\n            maybeGetClientInstanceIds();\n            maybePerformTransportMaintenance();\n\n            final long checkpointStartTimeMs = time.milliseconds();\n            maybeCheckpointTasks(checkpointStartTimeMs);\n\n            final long waitStartTimeMs = time.milliseconds();\n            waitIfAllChangelogsCompletelyRead();\n\n            final long endTimeMs = time.milliseconds();\n            final long totalWaitTime = Math.max(0L, endTimeMs - waitStartTimeMs);\n            final long totalTime = Math.max(0L, endTimeMs - totalStartTimeMs);\n\n            recordMetrics(endTimeMs, totalTime, totalWaitTime);\n        }\n\n        private void performActionsOnTasks() {\n            tasksAndActionsLock.lock();\n            try {\n                for (final TaskAndAction taskAndAction : tasksAndActions()) {\n                    final Action action = taskAndAction.action();\n                    switch (action) {\n                        case ADD:\n                            addTask(taskAndAction.task());\n                            break;\n                        case REMOVE:\n                            removeTask(taskAndAction.taskId(), taskAndAction.futureForRemove(), taskAndAction.suspendReason());\n                            break;\n                        default:\n                            throw new IllegalStateException(\"Unknown action type \" + action);\n                    }\n                }\n            } finally {\n                tasksAndActionsLock.unlock();\n            }\n        }\n\n        private void maybePerformTransportMaintenance() {\n            if (metricsConnector != null) {\n                final long nowMs = time.milliseconds();\n                if (nowMs - lastTransportMaintenanceMs >= TRANSPORT_MAINTENANCE_INTERVAL_MS) {\n                    lastTransportMaintenanceMs = nowMs;\n                    try {\n                        metricsConnector.performMaintenance();\n                    } catch (final Exception e) {\n                        log.warn(\"Metrics transport maintenance failed\", e);\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        private void resumeTasks() {\n            if (isTopologyResumed.compareAndSet(true, false)) {\n                for (final Task task : pausedTasks.values()) {\n                    if (!topologyMetadata.isPaused(task.id().topologyName())) {\n                        resumeTask(task);\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        private void pauseTasks() {\n            for (final Task task : updatingTasks.values()) {\n                if (topologyMetadata.isPaused(task.id().topologyName())) {\n                    pauseTask(task);\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        private void restoreTasks(final long now) {\n            try {\n                final long restored = changelogReader.restore(updatingTasks);\n                updaterMetrics.restoreSensor.record(restored, now);\n            } catch (final TaskCorruptedException taskCorruptedException) {\n                handleTaskCorruptedException(taskCorruptedException);\n            } catch (final StreamsException streamsException) {\n                handleStreamsException(streamsException);\n            }\n            final Set<TopicPartition> completedChangelogs = changelogReader.completedChangelogs();\n            final List<Task> activeTasks = updatingTasks.values().stream().filter(Task::isActive).collect(Collectors.toList());\n            for (final Task task : activeTasks) {\n                maybeCompleteRestoration((StreamTask) task, completedChangelogs);\n            }\n        }\n\n        private void maybeGetClientInstanceIds() {\n            if (fetchDeadlineClientInstanceId != -1) {\n                if (!clientInstanceIdFuture.isDone()) {\n                    if (fetchDeadlineClientInstanceId >= time.milliseconds()) {\n                        try {\n                            // if the state-updated thread has active work:\n                            //    we pass in a timeout of zero into each `clientInstanceId()` call\n                            //    to just trigger the \"get instance id\" background RPC;\n                            //    we don't want to block the state updater thread that can do useful work in the meantime\n                            // otherwise, we pass in 100ms to avoid busy waiting\n                            clientInstanceIdFuture.complete(\n                                restoreConsumer.clientInstanceId(\n                                    allWorkDone() ? Duration.ofMillis(100L) : Duration.ZERO\n                                )\n                            );\n                            fetchDeadlineClientInstanceId = -1L;\n                        } catch (final IllegalStateException disabledError) {\n                            // if telemetry is disabled on a client, we swallow the error,\n                            // to allow returning a partial result for all other clients\n                            clientInstanceIdFuture.complete(null);\n                            fetchDeadlineClientInstanceId = -1L;\n                        } catch (final TimeoutException swallow) {\n                            // swallow\n                        } catch (final Exception error) {\n                            clientInstanceIdFuture.completeExceptionally(error);\n                            fetchDeadlineClientInstanceId = -1L;\n                        }\n                    } else {\n                        clientInstanceIdFuture.completeExceptionally(\n                            new TimeoutException(\"Could not retrieve restore consumer client instance id.\")\n                        );\n                        fetchDeadlineClientInstanceId = -1L;\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        private KafkaFutureImpl<Uuid> restoreConsumerInstanceId(final Duration timeout) {\n            boolean setDeadline = false;\n\n            if (clientInstanceIdFuture.isDone()) {\n                if (clientInstanceIdFuture.isCompletedExceptionally()) {\n                    clientInstanceIdFuture = new KafkaFutureImpl<>();\n                    setDeadline = true;\n                }\n            } else {\n                setDeadline = true;\n            }\n\n            if (setDeadline) {\n                fetchDeadlineClientInstanceId = time.milliseconds() + timeout.toMillis();\n                tasksAndActionsLock.lock();\n                try {\n                    tasksAndActionsCondition.signalAll();\n                } finally {\n                    tasksAndActionsLock.unlock();\n                }\n            }\n\n            return clientInstanceIdFuture;\n        }\n\n\n        private void handleRuntimeException(final RuntimeException runtimeException) {\n            log.error(\"An unexpected error occurred within the state updater thread: {}\", String.valueOf(runtimeException));\n            addToExceptionsAndFailedTasksThenClearUpdatingAndPausedTasks(runtimeException);\n            isRunning.set(false);\n        }\n\n        private void handleTaskCorruptedException(final TaskCorruptedException taskCorruptedException) {\n            log.info(\"Encountered task corrupted exception: \", taskCorruptedException);\n            final Set<TaskId> corruptedTaskIds = taskCorruptedException.corruptedTasks();\n            final Set<Task> corruptedTasks = new HashSet<>();\n            final Set<TopicPartition> changelogsOfCorruptedTasks = new HashSet<>();\n            for (final TaskId taskId : corruptedTaskIds) {\n                final Task corruptedTask = updatingTasks.get(taskId);\n                if (corruptedTask == null) {\n                    throw new IllegalStateException(\"Task \" + taskId + \" is corrupted but is not updating. \" + BUG_ERROR_MESSAGE);\n                }\n                corruptedTasks.add(corruptedTask);\n                removeCheckpointForCorruptedTask(corruptedTask);\n                changelogsOfCorruptedTasks.addAll(corruptedTask.changelogPartitions());\n            }\n            changelogReader.unregister(changelogsOfCorruptedTasks);\n            corruptedTasks.forEach(\n                task -> addToExceptionsAndFailedTasksThenRemoveFromUpdatingTasks(new ExceptionAndTask(taskCorruptedException, task))\n            );\n        }\n\n        // TODO: we can let the exception encode the actual corrupted changelog partitions and only\n        //       mark those instead of marking all changelogs\n        private void removeCheckpointForCorruptedTask(final Task task) {\n            try {\n                task.markChangelogAsCorrupted(task.changelogPartitions());\n\n                // we need to enforce a checkpoint that removes the corrupted partitions\n                measureCheckpointLatency(() -> task.maybeCheckpoint(true));\n            } catch (final StreamsException swallow) {\n                log.warn(\"Checkpoint failed for corrupted task {}\", task.id(), swallow);\n            }\n        }\n\n        private void handleStreamsException(final StreamsException streamsException) {\n            log.info(\"Encountered streams exception: \", streamsException);\n            if (streamsException.taskId().isPresent()) {\n                handleStreamsExceptionWithTask(streamsException, streamsException.taskId().get());\n            } else {\n                handleStreamsExceptionWithoutTask(streamsException);\n            }\n        }\n\n        private void handleStreamsExceptionWithTask(final StreamsException streamsException, final TaskId failedTaskId) {\n            if (updatingTasks.containsKey(failedTaskId)) {\n                addToExceptionsAndFailedTasksThenRemoveFromUpdatingTasks(\n                    new ExceptionAndTask(streamsException, updatingTasks.get(failedTaskId))\n                );\n            } else if (pausedTasks.containsKey(failedTaskId)) {\n                addToExceptionsAndFailedTasksThenRemoveFromPausedTasks(\n                    new ExceptionAndTask(streamsException, pausedTasks.get(failedTaskId))\n                );\n            } else {\n                throw new IllegalStateException(\"Task \" + failedTaskId + \" failed but is not updating or paused. \" + BUG_ERROR_MESSAGE);\n            }\n        }\n\n        private void handleStreamsExceptionWithoutTask(final StreamsException streamsException) {\n            addToExceptionsAndFailedTasksThenClearUpdatingAndPausedTasks(streamsException);\n        }\n\n        // It is important to remove the corrupted tasks from the updating tasks after they were added to the\n        // failed tasks.\n        // This ensures that all tasks are found in DefaultStateUpdater#getTasks().\n        private void addToExceptionsAndFailedTasksThenRemoveFromUpdatingTasks(final ExceptionAndTask exceptionAndTask) {\n            exceptionsAndFailedTasksLock.lock();\n            try {\n                exceptionsAndFailedTasks.add(exceptionAndTask);\n                updatingTasks.remove(exceptionAndTask.task().id());\n                if (exceptionAndTask.task().isActive()) {\n                    transitToUpdateStandbysIfOnlyStandbysLeft();\n                }\n            } finally {\n                exceptionsAndFailedTasksLock.unlock();\n            }\n        }\n\n        private void addToExceptionsAndFailedTasksThenRemoveFromPausedTasks(final ExceptionAndTask exceptionAndTask) {\n            exceptionsAndFailedTasksLock.lock();\n            try {\n                exceptionsAndFailedTasks.add(exceptionAndTask);\n                pausedTasks.remove(exceptionAndTask.task().id());\n                if (exceptionAndTask.task().isActive()) {\n                    transitToUpdateStandbysIfOnlyStandbysLeft();\n                }\n            } finally {\n                exceptionsAndFailedTasksLock.unlock();\n            }\n        }\n\n        private void addToExceptionsAndFailedTasksThenClearUpdatingAndPausedTasks(final RuntimeException runtimeException) {\n            exceptionsAndFailedTasksLock.lock();\n            try {\n                updatingTasks.values().forEach(\n                    task -> exceptionsAndFailedTasks.add(new ExceptionAndTask(runtimeException, task))\n                );\n                updatingTasks.clear();\n                pausedTasks.values().forEach(\n                    task -> exceptionsAndFailedTasks.add(new ExceptionAndTask(runtimeException, task))\n                );\n                pausedTasks.clear();\n            } finally {\n                exceptionsAndFailedTasksLock.unlock();\n            }\n        }\n\n        private void waitIfAllChangelogsCompletelyRead() {\n            tasksAndActionsLock.lock();\n            try {\n                while (allWorkDone() && fetchDeadlineClientInstanceId == -1L) {\n                    isIdle.set(true);\n                    tasksAndActionsCondition.await();\n                }\n            } catch (final InterruptedException ignored) {\n                // we never interrupt the thread, but only signal the condition\n                // and hence this exception should never be thrown\n            } finally {\n                tasksAndActionsLock.unlock();\n                isIdle.set(false);\n            }\n        }\n\n        private boolean allWorkDone() {\n            final boolean noTasksToUpdate = changelogReader.allChangelogsCompleted() || updatingTasks.isEmpty();\n\n            return isRunning.get() &&\n                noTasksToUpdate &&\n                tasksAndActions.isEmpty() &&\n                !isTopologyResumed.get();\n        }\n\n        private void clearUpdatingAndPausedTasks() {\n            updatingTasks.clear();\n            pausedTasks.clear();\n            changelogReader.clear();\n        }\n\n        private List<TaskAndAction> tasksAndActions() {\n            final List<TaskAndAction> tasksAndActionsToProcess = new ArrayList<>(tasksAndActions);\n            tasksAndActions.clear();\n            return tasksAndActionsToProcess;\n        }\n\n        private void addTask(final Task task) {\n            final TaskId taskId = task.id();\n\n            Task existingTask = pausedTasks.get(taskId);\n            if (existingTask != null) {\n                throw new IllegalStateException(\n                    (existingTask.isActive() ? \"Active\" : \"Standby\") + \" task \" + taskId + \" already exist in paused tasks, \" +\n                        \"should not try to add another \" + (task.isActive() ? \"active\" : \"standby\") + \" task with the same id. \"\n                        + BUG_ERROR_MESSAGE);\n            }\n            existingTask = updatingTasks.get(taskId);\n            if (existingTask != null) {\n                throw new IllegalStateException(\n                    (existingTask.isActive() ? \"Active\" : \"Standby\") + \" task \" + taskId + \" already exist in updating tasks, \" +\n                        \"should not try to add another \" + (task.isActive() ? \"active\" : \"standby\") + \" task with the same id. \"\n                        + BUG_ERROR_MESSAGE);\n            }\n\n            if (isStateless(task)) {\n                addToRestoredTasks((StreamTask) task);\n                log.info(\"Stateless active task \" + taskId + \" was added to the restored tasks of the state updater\");\n            } else if (topologyMetadata.isPaused(taskId.topologyName())) {\n                pausedTasks.put(taskId, task);\n                changelogReader.register(task.changelogPartitions(), task.stateManager());\n                log.debug((task.isActive() ? \"Active\" : \"Standby\")\n                    + \" task \" + taskId + \" was directly added to the paused tasks.\");\n            } else {\n                updatingTasks.put(taskId, task);\n                changelogReader.register(task.changelogPartitions(), task.stateManager());\n                if (task.isActive()) {\n                    log.info(\"Stateful active task \" + taskId + \" was added to the state updater\");\n                    changelogReader.enforceRestoreActive();\n                } else {\n                    log.info(\"Standby task \" + taskId + \" was added to the state updater\");\n                    if (updatingTasks.size() == 1) {\n                        changelogReader.transitToUpdateStandby();\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        private void removeTask(final TaskId taskId,\n                                final CompletableFuture<RemovedTaskResult> future,\n                                final StandbyUpdateListener.SuspendReason suspendReason) {\n            try {\n                if (!removeUpdatingTask(taskId, future, suspendReason)\n                    && !removePausedTask(taskId, future, suspendReason)\n                    && !removeRestoredTask(taskId, future)\n                    && !removeFailedTask(taskId, future)) {\n\n                    future.complete(null);\n                    log.warn(\"Task {} could not be removed from the state updater because the state updater does not\"\n                        + \" own this task.\", taskId);\n                }\n            } catch (final StreamsException streamsException) {\n                handleStreamsExceptionWithTask(streamsException, taskId);\n                future.completeExceptionally(streamsException);\n            } catch (final RuntimeException runtimeException) {\n                handleRuntimeException(runtimeException);\n                future.completeExceptionally(runtimeException);\n            }\n        }\n\n        private boolean removeUpdatingTask(final TaskId taskId,\n                                           final CompletableFuture<RemovedTaskResult> future,\n                                           final StandbyUpdateListener.SuspendReason suspendReason) {\n            if (!updatingTasks.containsKey(taskId)) {\n                return false;\n            }\n            final Task task = updatingTasks.get(taskId);\n            prepareUpdatingTaskForRemoval(task, suspendReason);\n            updatingTasks.remove(taskId);\n            if (task.isActive()) {\n                transitToUpdateStandbysIfOnlyStandbysLeft();\n            }\n            log.info((task.isActive() ? \"Active\" : \"Standby\")\n                + \" task \" + task.id() + \" was removed from the updating tasks.\");\n            future.complete(new RemovedTaskResult(task));\n            return true;\n        }\n\n        private void prepareUpdatingTaskForRemoval(final Task task,\n                                                   final StandbyUpdateListener.SuspendReason suspendReason) {\n            measureCheckpointLatency(() -> task.maybeCheckpoint(true));\n            final Collection<TopicPartition> changelogPartitions = task.changelogPartitions();\n            changelogReader.unregister(changelogPartitions, suspendReason);\n        }\n\n        private boolean removePausedTask(final TaskId taskId,\n                                         final CompletableFuture<RemovedTaskResult> future,\n                                         final StandbyUpdateListener.SuspendReason suspendReason) {\n            if (!pausedTasks.containsKey(taskId)) {\n                return false;\n            }\n            final Task task = pausedTasks.get(taskId);\n            preparePausedTaskForRemoval(task, suspendReason);\n            pausedTasks.remove(taskId);\n            log.info((task.isActive() ? \"Active\" : \"Standby\")\n                + \" task \" + task.id() + \" was removed from the paused tasks.\");\n            future.complete(new RemovedTaskResult(task));\n            return true;\n        }\n\n        private void preparePausedTaskForRemoval(final Task task,\n                                                 final StandbyUpdateListener.SuspendReason suspendReason) {\n            final Collection<TopicPartition> changelogPartitions = task.changelogPartitions();\n            changelogReader.unregister(changelogPartitions, suspendReason);\n        }\n\n        private boolean removeRestoredTask(final TaskId taskId, final CompletableFuture<RemovedTaskResult> future) {\n            restoredActiveTasksLock.lock();\n            try {\n                final Iterator<StreamTask> iterator = restoredActiveTasks.iterator();\n                while (iterator.hasNext()) {\n                    final StreamTask restoredTask = iterator.next();\n                    if (restoredTask.id().equals(taskId)) {\n                        iterator.remove();\n                        log.info((restoredTask.isActive() ? \"Active\" : \"Standby\")\n                            + \" task \" + restoredTask.id() + \" was removed from the restored tasks.\");\n                        future.complete(new RemovedTaskResult(restoredTask));\n                        return true;\n                    }\n                }\n                return false;\n            } finally {\n                restoredActiveTasksLock.unlock();\n            }\n        }\n\n        private boolean removeFailedTask(final TaskId taskId, final CompletableFuture<RemovedTaskResult> future) {\n            exceptionsAndFailedTasksLock.lock();\n            try {\n                final Iterator<ExceptionAndTask> iterator = exceptionsAndFailedTasks.iterator();\n                while (iterator.hasNext()) {\n                    final ExceptionAndTask exceptionAndTask = iterator.next();\n                    final Task failedTask = exceptionAndTask.task();\n                    if (failedTask.id().equals(taskId)) {\n                        iterator.remove();\n                        log.info((failedTask.isActive() ? \"Active\" : \"Standby\")\n                            + \" task \" + failedTask.id() + \" was removed from the failed tasks.\");\n                        future.complete(new RemovedTaskResult(failedTask, exceptionAndTask.exception()));\n                        return true;\n                    }\n                }\n                return false;\n            } finally {\n                exceptionsAndFailedTasksLock.unlock();\n            }\n        }\n\n        private void pauseTask(final Task task) {\n            final TaskId taskId = task.id();\n            // do not need to unregister changelog partitions for paused tasks\n            try {\n                measureCheckpointLatency(() -> task.maybeCheckpoint(true));\n                pausedTasks.put(taskId, task);\n                updatingTasks.remove(taskId);\n                if (task.isActive()) {\n                    transitToUpdateStandbysIfOnlyStandbysLeft();\n                }\n                log.info((task.isActive() ? \"Active\" : \"Standby\")\n                    + \" task \" + task.id() + \" was paused from the updating tasks and added to the paused tasks.\");\n\n            } catch (final StreamsException streamsException) {\n                handleStreamsExceptionWithTask(streamsException, taskId);\n            }\n        }\n\n        private void resumeTask(final Task task) {\n            final TaskId taskId = task.id();\n            updatingTasks.put(taskId, task);\n            pausedTasks.remove(taskId);\n\n            if (task.isActive()) {\n                log.info(\"Stateful active task \" + task.id() + \" was resumed to the updating tasks of the state updater\");\n                changelogReader.enforceRestoreActive();\n            } else {\n                log.info(\"Standby task \" + task.id() + \" was resumed to the updating tasks of the state updater\");\n                if (updatingTasks.size() == 1) {\n                    changelogReader.transitToUpdateStandby();\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        private boolean isStateless(final Task task) {\n            return task.changelogPartitions().isEmpty() && task.isActive();\n        }\n\n        private void maybeCompleteRestoration(final StreamTask task,\n                                              final Set<TopicPartition> restoredChangelogs) {\n            final Collection<TopicPartition> changelogPartitions = task.changelogPartitions();\n            if (restoredChangelogs.containsAll(changelogPartitions)) {\n                try {\n                    measureCheckpointLatency(() -> task.maybeCheckpoint(true));\n                    changelogReader.unregister(changelogPartitions);\n                    addToRestoredTasks(task);\n                    log.info(\"Stateful active task \" + task.id() + \" completed restoration\");\n                    transitToUpdateStandbysIfOnlyStandbysLeft();\n                } catch (final StreamsException streamsException) {\n                    handleStreamsExceptionWithTask(streamsException, task.id());\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        private void transitToUpdateStandbysIfOnlyStandbysLeft() {\n            if (onlyStandbyTasksUpdating()) {\n                changelogReader.transitToUpdateStandby();\n            }\n        }\n\n        private void addToRestoredTasks(final StreamTask task) {\n            restoredActiveTasksLock.lock();\n            try {\n                restoredActiveTasks.add(task);\n                updatingTasks.remove(task.id());\n                log.debug(\"Active task \" + task.id() + \" was added to the restored tasks\");\n                restoredActiveTasksCondition.signalAll();\n            } finally {\n                restoredActiveTasksLock.unlock();\n            }\n        }\n\n        private void maybeCheckpointTasks(final long now) {\n            final long elapsedMsSinceLastCommit = now - lastCommitMs;\n            if (elapsedMsSinceLastCommit > commitIntervalMs) {\n                if (log.isDebugEnabled()) {\n                    log.debug(\"Checkpointing state of all restoring tasks since {}ms has elapsed (commit interval is {}ms)\",\n                        elapsedMsSinceLastCommit, commitIntervalMs);\n                }\n\n                measureCheckpointLatency(() -> {\n                    for (final Task task : updatingTasks.values()) {\n                        try {\n                            // do not enforce checkpointing during restoration if its position has not advanced much\n                            task.maybeCheckpoint(false);\n                        } catch (final StreamsException streamsException) {\n                            handleStreamsExceptionWithTask(streamsException, task.id());\n                        }\n                    }\n                });\n\n                lastCommitMs = now;\n            }\n        }\n\n        private void measureCheckpointLatency(final Runnable actionToMeasure) {\n            final long startMs = time.milliseconds();\n            try {\n                actionToMeasure.run();\n            } finally {\n                totalCheckpointLatency += Math.max(0L, time.milliseconds() - startMs);\n            }\n        }\n\n        private void recordMetrics(final long now, final long totalLatency, final long totalWaitLatency) {\n            final long totalRestoreLatency = Math.max(0L, totalLatency - totalWaitLatency - totalCheckpointLatency);\n\n            recordWindowedSum(\n                now,\n                totalWaitLatency,\n                totalCheckpointLatency,\n                totalRestoreLatency * (changelogReader.isRestoringActive() ? 1.0d : 0.0d),\n                totalRestoreLatency * (changelogReader.isRestoringActive() ? 0.0d : 1.0d),\n                totalLatency\n            );\n\n            recordRatios(now);\n\n            totalCheckpointLatency = 0L;\n        }\n\n        private void initTimeWindowIfNeeded(final long now) {\n            if (!timeWindowInitialized) {\n                idleTimeWindowedSum.record(metricsConfig, 0.0, now);\n                checkpointTimeWindowedSum.record(metricsConfig, 0.0, now);\n                activeRestoreTimeWindowedSum.record(metricsConfig, 0.0, now);\n                standbyRestoreTimeWindowedSum.record(metricsConfig, 0.0, now);\n                runOnceLatencyWindowedSum.record(metricsConfig, 0.0, now);\n                timeWindowInitialized = true;\n            }\n        }\n\n        private void recordWindowedSum(final long now,\n                                       final double idleTime,\n                                       final double checkpointTime,\n                                       final double activeRestoreTime,\n                                       final double standbyRestoreTime,\n                                       final double totalLatency) {\n            idleTimeWindowedSum.record(metricsConfig, idleTime, now);\n            checkpointTimeWindowedSum.record(metricsConfig, checkpointTime, now);\n            activeRestoreTimeWindowedSum.record(metricsConfig, activeRestoreTime, now);\n            standbyRestoreTimeWindowedSum.record(metricsConfig, standbyRestoreTime, now);\n            runOnceLatencyWindowedSum.record(metricsConfig, totalLatency, now);\n        }\n\n        private void recordRatios(final long now) {\n            final double runOnceLatencyWindow = runOnceLatencyWindowedSum.measure(metricsConfig, now);\n\n            recordRatio(now, runOnceLatencyWindow, idleTimeWindowedSum, updaterMetrics.idleRatioSensor);\n            recordRatio(now, runOnceLatencyWindow, checkpointTimeWindowedSum, updaterMetrics.checkpointRatioSensor);\n            recordRatio(now, runOnceLatencyWindow, activeRestoreTimeWindowedSum, updaterMetrics.activeRestoreRatioSensor);\n            recordRatio(now, runOnceLatencyWindow, standbyRestoreTimeWindowedSum, updaterMetrics.standbyRestoreRatioSensor);\n        }\n\n        private void recordRatio(final long now,\n                                 final double runOnceLatencyWindow,\n                                 final WindowedSum windowedSum,\n                                 final Sensor ratioSensor) {\n            if (runOnceLatencyWindow > 0.0) {\n                final double elapsedTime = windowedSum.measure(metricsConfig, now);\n                ratioSensor.record(elapsedTime / runOnceLatencyWindow, now);\n            } else {\n                ratioSensor.record(0.0, now);\n            }\n        }\n\n    }\n\n    private final Time time;\n    private final Logger log;\n    private final String name;\n    private final StreamsMetricsImpl metrics;\n    private final Consumer<byte[], byte[]> restoreConsumer;\n    private final ChangelogReader changelogReader;\n    private final TopologyMetadata topologyMetadata;\n    private final Queue<TaskAndAction> tasksAndActions = new LinkedList<>();\n    private final Lock tasksAndActionsLock = new ReentrantLock();\n    private final Condition tasksAndActionsCondition = tasksAndActionsLock.newCondition();\n    private final Queue<StreamTask> restoredActiveTasks = new LinkedList<>();\n    private final Lock restoredActiveTasksLock = new ReentrantLock();\n    private final Condition restoredActiveTasksCondition = restoredActiveTasksLock.newCondition();\n    private final Lock exceptionsAndFailedTasksLock = new ReentrantLock();\n    private final Queue<ExceptionAndTask> exceptionsAndFailedTasks = new LinkedList<>();\n    private final BlockingQueue<Task> removedTasks = new LinkedBlockingQueue<>();\n    private final AtomicBoolean isTopologyResumed = new AtomicBoolean(false);\n\n    private final long commitIntervalMs;\n    private long lastCommitMs;\n\n    private StateUpdaterThread stateUpdaterThread = null;\n\n    private StreamsMetricsConnector metricsConnector;\n    private long lastTransportMaintenanceMs = 0L;\n    private static final long TRANSPORT_MAINTENANCE_INTERVAL_MS = 30_000L;\n\n    public void setMetricsConnector(final StreamsMetricsConnector connector) {\n        this.metricsConnector = connector;\n    }\n\n    public DefaultStateUpdater(final String name,\n                               final StreamsMetricsImpl metrics,\n                               final StreamsConfig config,\n                               final Consumer<byte[], byte[]> restoreConsumer,\n                               final ChangelogReader changelogReader,\n                               final TopologyMetadata topologyMetadata,\n                               final Time time) {\n        this.time = time;\n        this.name = name;\n        this.metrics = metrics;\n        this.restoreConsumer = restoreConsumer;\n        this.changelogReader = changelogReader;\n        this.topologyMetadata = topologyMetadata;\n        this.commitIntervalMs = config.getLong(StreamsConfig.COMMIT_INTERVAL_MS_CONFIG);\n\n        final String logPrefix = String.format(\"state-updater [%s] \", name);\n        final LogContext logContext = new LogContext(logPrefix);\n        this.log = logContext.logger(DefaultStateUpdater.class);\n    }\n\n    public void start() {\n        if (stateUpdaterThread == null) {\n            if (!restoredActiveTasks.isEmpty() || !exceptionsAndFailedTasks.isEmpty()) {\n                throw new IllegalStateException(\"State updater started with non-empty output queues. \"\n                    + BUG_ERROR_MESSAGE);\n            }\n            stateUpdaterThread = new StateUpdaterThread(name, metrics, changelogReader);\n            stateUpdaterThread.start();\n\n            // initialize the last commit as of now to prevent first commit happens immediately\n            this.lastCommitMs = time.milliseconds();\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public void shutdown(final Duration timeout) {\n        if (stateUpdaterThread != null) {\n            log.info(\"Shutting down state updater thread\");\n\n            // first set the running flag and then\n            // notify the condition in case the thread is waiting on it;\n            // note this ordering should not be changed\n            stateUpdaterThread.isRunning.set(false);\n\n            tasksAndActionsLock.lock();\n            try {\n                tasksAndActionsCondition.signalAll();\n            } finally {\n                tasksAndActionsLock.unlock();\n            }\n\n            try {\n                stateUpdaterThread.join(timeout.toMillis());\n                if (stateUpdaterThread.isAlive()) {\n                    throw new StreamsException(\"State updater thread did not shutdown within the timeout\");\n                }\n                stateUpdaterThread = null;\n            } catch (final InterruptedException ignored) {\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public void add(final Task task) {\n        verifyStateFor(task);\n\n        tasksAndActionsLock.lock();\n        try {\n            tasksAndActions.add(TaskAndAction.createAddTask(task));\n            tasksAndActionsCondition.signalAll();\n        } finally {\n            tasksAndActionsLock.unlock();\n        }\n    }\n\n    private void verifyStateFor(final Task task) {\n        if (task.isActive() && task.state() != State.RESTORING) {\n            throw new IllegalStateException(\"Active task \" + task.id() + \" is not in state RESTORING. \" + BUG_ERROR_MESSAGE);\n        }\n        if (!task.isActive() && task.state() != State.RUNNING) {\n            throw new IllegalStateException(\"Standby task \" + task.id() + \" is not in state RUNNING. \" + BUG_ERROR_MESSAGE);\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public CompletableFuture<RemovedTaskResult> remove(final TaskId taskId,\n                                                       final StandbyUpdateListener.SuspendReason suspendReason) {\n        final CompletableFuture<RemovedTaskResult> future = new CompletableFuture<>();\n        tasksAndActionsLock.lock();\n        try {\n            tasksAndActions.add(TaskAndAction.createRemoveTask(taskId, future, suspendReason));\n            tasksAndActionsCondition.signalAll();\n        } finally {\n            tasksAndActionsLock.unlock();\n        }\n        return future;\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public void signalResume() {\n        tasksAndActionsLock.lock();\n        try {\n            isTopologyResumed.set(true);\n            tasksAndActionsCondition.signalAll();\n        } finally {\n            tasksAndActionsLock.unlock();\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public Set<StreamTask> drainRestoredActiveTasks(final Duration timeout) {\n        final long timeoutMs = timeout.toMillis();\n        final long startTime = time.milliseconds();\n        final long deadline = startTime + timeoutMs;\n        long now = startTime;\n        final Set<StreamTask> result = new HashSet<>();\n        try {\n            while (now <= deadline && result.isEmpty()) {\n                restoredActiveTasksLock.lock();\n                try {\n                    while (restoredActiveTasks.isEmpty() && now <= deadline) {\n                        // We can ignore whether the deadline expired during await, as the while loop condition will\n                        // check again for deadline expiration.\n                        @SuppressWarnings(\"UnusedLocalVariable\")\n                        final boolean ignored = restoredActiveTasksCondition.await(deadline - now, TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS);\n                        now = time.milliseconds();\n                    }\n                    result.addAll(restoredActiveTasks);\n                    restoredActiveTasks.clear();\n                } finally {\n                    restoredActiveTasksLock.unlock();\n                }\n                now = time.milliseconds();\n            }\n            return result;\n        } catch (final InterruptedException ignored) {\n        }\n        return result;\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public List<ExceptionAndTask> drainExceptionsAndFailedTasks() {\n        final List<ExceptionAndTask> result = new ArrayList<>();\n        exceptionsAndFailedTasksLock.lock();\n        try {\n            result.addAll(exceptionsAndFailedTasks);\n            exceptionsAndFailedTasks.clear();\n        } finally {\n            exceptionsAndFailedTasksLock.unlock();\n        }\n        return result;\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public boolean hasExceptionsAndFailedTasks() {\n        exceptionsAndFailedTasksLock.lock();\n        try {\n            return !exceptionsAndFailedTasks.isEmpty();\n        } finally {\n            exceptionsAndFailedTasksLock.unlock();\n        }\n    }\n\n    public Set<StandbyTask> updatingStandbyTasks() {\n        return stateUpdaterThread != null\n            ? Set.copyOf(stateUpdaterThread.updatingStandbyTasks())\n            : Collections.emptySet();\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public Set<Task> updatingTasks() {\n        return stateUpdaterThread != null\n            ? Set.copyOf(stateUpdaterThread.updatingTasks())\n            : Collections.emptySet();\n    }\n\n    public Set<StreamTask> restoredActiveTasks() {\n        restoredActiveTasksLock.lock();\n        try {\n            return Set.copyOf(restoredActiveTasks);\n        } finally {\n            restoredActiveTasksLock.unlock();\n        }\n    }\n\n    public List<ExceptionAndTask> exceptionsAndFailedTasks() {\n        exceptionsAndFailedTasksLock.lock();\n        try {\n            return List.copyOf(exceptionsAndFailedTasks);\n        } finally {\n            exceptionsAndFailedTasksLock.unlock();\n        }\n    }\n\n    public Set<Task> removedTasks() {\n        return Set.copyOf(removedTasks);\n    }\n\n    public Set<Task> pausedTasks() {\n        return stateUpdaterThread != null\n            ? Set.copyOf(stateUpdaterThread.pausedTasks())\n            : Collections.emptySet();\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public Set<Task> tasks() {\n        return executeWithQueuesLocked(() -> streamOfTasks().map(ReadOnlyTask::new).collect(Collectors.toSet()));\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public boolean restoresActiveTasks() {\n        return !executeWithQueuesLocked(\n            () -> streamOfTasks().filter(Task::isActive).collect(Collectors.toSet())\n        ).isEmpty();\n    }\n\n    public Set<StreamTask> activeTasks() {\n        return executeWithQueuesLocked(\n            () -> streamOfTasks().filter(Task::isActive).map(t -> (StreamTask) t).collect(Collectors.toSet())\n        );\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public Set<StandbyTask> standbyTasks() {\n        return executeWithQueuesLocked(\n            () -> streamOfTasks().filter(t -> !t.isActive()).map(t -> (StandbyTask) t).collect(Collectors.toSet())\n        );\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public KafkaFutureImpl<Uuid> restoreConsumerInstanceId(final Duration timeout) {\n        return stateUpdaterThread.restoreConsumerInstanceId(timeout);\n    }\n\n    public boolean isRunning() {\n        return stateUpdaterThread != null && stateUpdaterThread.isRunning.get();\n    }\n\n    // used for testing\n    boolean isIdle() {\n        if (stateUpdaterThread != null) {\n            return stateUpdaterThread.isIdle.get();\n        }\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    private <T> Set<T> executeWithQueuesLocked(final Supplier<Set<T>> action) {\n        tasksAndActionsLock.lock();\n        restoredActiveTasksLock.lock();\n        exceptionsAndFailedTasksLock.lock();\n        try {\n            return action.get();\n        } finally {\n            exceptionsAndFailedTasksLock.unlock();\n            restoredActiveTasksLock.unlock();\n            tasksAndActionsLock.unlock();\n        }\n    }\n\n    private Stream<Task> streamOfTasks() {\n        return\n            Stream.concat(\n                streamOfNonPausedTasks(),\n                pausedTasks().stream()\n            );\n    }\n\n    private Stream<Task> streamOfNonPausedTasks() {\n        return\n            Stream.concat(\n                tasksAndActions.stream()\n                    .filter(taskAndAction -> taskAndAction.action() == Action.ADD)\n                    .map(TaskAndAction::task),\n                Stream.concat(\n                    updatingTasks().stream(),\n                    Stream.concat(\n                        restoredActiveTasks.stream(),\n                        Stream.concat(\n                            exceptionsAndFailedTasks.stream().map(ExceptionAndTask::task),\n                            removedTasks.stream()))));\n    }\n\n    private class StateUpdaterMetrics {\n        private static final String STATE_LEVEL_GROUP = \"stream-state-updater-metrics\";\n\n        private static final String IDLE_RATIO_DESCRIPTION = WINDOWED_RATIO_DESCRIPTION_PREFIX + THREAD_TIME_UNIT_DESCRIPTION + \"being idle\";\n        private static final String RESTORE_RATIO_DESCRIPTION = WINDOWED_RATIO_DESCRIPTION_PREFIX + THREAD_TIME_UNIT_DESCRIPTION + \"restoring active tasks\";\n        private static final String UPDATE_RATIO_DESCRIPTION = WINDOWED_RATIO_DESCRIPTION_PREFIX + THREAD_TIME_UNIT_DESCRIPTION + \"updating standby tasks\";\n        private static final String CHECKPOINT_RATIO_DESCRIPTION = WINDOWED_RATIO_DESCRIPTION_PREFIX + THREAD_TIME_UNIT_DESCRIPTION + \"checkpointing tasks restored progress\";\n        private static final String RESTORE_RECORDS_RATE_DESCRIPTION = RATE_DESCRIPTION + \"records restored\";\n        private static final String RESTORE_RATE_DESCRIPTION = RATE_DESCRIPTION + \"restore calls triggered\";\n\n        private final Sensor restoreSensor;\n        private final Sensor idleRatioSensor;\n        private final Sensor activeRestoreRatioSensor;\n        private final Sensor standbyRestoreRatioSensor;\n        private final Sensor checkpointRatioSensor;\n\n        private final Deque<Sensor> allSensors = new LinkedList<>();\n        private final Deque<MetricName> allMetricNames = new LinkedList<>();\n\n        private StateUpdaterMetrics(final StreamsMetricsImpl metrics, final String threadId) {\n            final Map<String, String> threadLevelTags = new addToRestoredTasks((StreamTask) task);\n                log.info(\"Stateless active task \" + taskId + \" was added to the restored tasks of the state updater\");\n            } else if (topologyMetadata.isPaused(taskId.topologyName())) {\n                pausedTasks.put(taskId, task);\n                changelogReader.register(task.changelogPartitions(), task.stateManager());\n updatingTasks.put(taskId, task);\n                changelogReader.register(task.changelogPartitions(), task.stateManager());\n                if (task.isActive()) {\n                    log.info(\"Stateful active task \" + taskId + \" was added to the state updater\");\n                    changelogReader.enforceRestoreActive();\n                } else {\n                    log.info(\"Standby task \" + taskId + \" was added to the state updater\");\n                    if (updatingTasks.size() == 1) {\n                        changelogReader.transitToUpdateStandby();\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        private void removeTask(final TaskId taskId,\n                                final CompletableFuture<RemovedTaskResult>       future.complete(null);\n                    log.warn(\"Task {} could not be removed from the state updater because the state updater does not\"\n                        + \" own this task.\", taskId);\n                }\n            } catch (final StreamsException streamsException) {\n                handleStreamsExceptionWithTask(streamsException, taskId);\n                future.completeExceptionally(streamsException);\n            } catch (final RuntimeException runtimeException) {\n                handleRuntimeException(runtimeException);\n                future.completeExceptionally(runtimeException);\n            }\n        }\n\n        private boolean removeUpdatingTask(final TaskId taskId,\n                                           final changelogReader.unregister(changelogPartitions, suspendReason);\n        }\n\n        private boolean removePausedTask(final TaskId taskId,\n                                         final pausedTasks.remove(taskId);\n            log.info((task.isActive() ? \"Active\" : \"Standby\")\n                + \" task \" + task.id() + \" was removed from the paused tasks.\");\n            future.complete(new RemovedTaskResult(task));\n            return true;\n        }\n\n        private void preparePausedTaskForRemoval(final Task task,\n changelogReader.unregister(changelogPartitions, suspendReason);\n        }\n\n        private boolean removeRestoredTask(final TaskId taskId, final CompletableFuture<RemovedTaskResult> future) {\n            restoredActiveTasksLock.lock();\n            try {\n                final Iterator<StreamTask> iterator = restoredActiveTasks.iterator();\n                while (iterator.hasNext()) {\n                    final StreamTask restoredTask = iterator.next();\n                    if (restoredTask.id().equals(taskId)) {\n                        iterator.remove();\n future.complete(new RemovedTaskResult(restoredTask));\n                        return true;\n                    }\n                }\n                return false;\n            } finally {\n     private void pauseTask(final Task task) {\n            final TaskId taskId = task.id();\n            // do not need to unregister changelog partitions for paused tasks\n            try {\n                measureCheckpointLatency(() -> task.maybeCheckpoint(true));\n                pausedTasks.put(taskId, task);\n                updatingTasks.remove(taskId);\n                if (task.isActive()) handleStreamsExceptionWithTask(streamsException, taskId);\n            }\n        }\n\n        private void resumeTask(final Task task) {\n            final TaskId taskId = task.id();\n            updatingTasks.put(taskId, task);\n            pausedTasks.remove(taskId);\n\n            if (task.isActive()) {\n                log.info(\"Stateful active task \" + task.id() + \" was resumed to the updating tasks of the state updater\");\n                changelogReader.enforceRestoreActive();\n            } else {\n                log.info(\"Standby task \" + task.id() + \" was resumed to the updating tasks of the state updater\");\n                if (updatingTasks.size() == 1) {\n                    changelogReader.transitToUpdateStandby();\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        private boolean isStateless(final Task task) {\n            return task.changelogPartitions().isEmpty() && task.isActive();\n        }\n\n        private void (onlyStandbyTasksUpdating()) {\n                changelogReader.transitToUpdateStandby();\n            }\n        }\n\n        private void addToRestoredTasks(final StreamTask task) {\n }\n        }\n\n        private void maybeCheckpointTasks(final long now) {\n            final long elapsedMsSinceLastCommit = now - lastCommitMs;\n            if (elapsedMsSinceLastCommit >                  elapsedMsSinceLastCommit, commitIntervalMs);\n                }\n\n                measureCheckpointLatency(() -> {\n                    for (final Task task : updatingTasks.values())                     }\n                    }\n                });\n\n                lastCommitMs = now;\n            }\n        }\n\n        private void measureCheckpointLatency(final Runnable actionToMeasure) {\n            final long startMs = time.milliseconds();\n            try {\n                actionToMeasure.run();\n            } finally {\n                totalCheckpointLatency += private boolean setState(final State newState) {\n        final State oldState;\n\n        synchronized (stateLock) {\n            oldState = state;\n\n            if (state == State.PENDING_SHUTDOWN && newState != State.NOT_RUNNING) {\n                // when the state is already in PENDING_SHUTDOWN, all other transitions than NOT_RUNNING (due to thread dying) will be\n                // refused, but we do not throw exception here, to allow appropriate error handling\n                return false;\n            } else if (state == State.NOT_RUNNING && (newState == State.PENDING_SHUTDOWN || newState == State.NOT_RUNNING)) {\n                // when the state is already in NOT_RUNNING, its transition to PENDING_SHUTDOWN or NOT_RUNNING (due to consecutive close calls)\n                // will be refused, but we do not throw exception here, to allow idempotent close calls\n                return false;\n            } else if (state == State.REBALANCING && newState == State.REBALANCING) {\n                // when the state is already in REBALANCING, it should not transit to REBALANCING again\n                return false;\n            } else if (state == State.ERROR && (newState == State.PENDING_ERROR || newState == State.ERROR || newState == State.PENDING_SHUTDOWN)) {\n                // when the state is already in ERROR, its transition attempts to PENDING_SHUTDOWN, PENDING_ERROR or ERROR will\n                // not throw an exception.\n                return false;\n            } else if (state == State.PENDING_ERROR && newState != State.ERROR) {\n                // when the state is already in PENDING_ERROR, all other transitions than ERROR (due to thread dying) will be\n                // refused, but we do not throw exception here, to allow appropriate error handling\n                return false;\n            } else if (!state.isValidTransition(newState)) {\n                throw new IllegalStateException(\"Stream-client \" + clientId + \": Unexpected state transition from \" + oldState + \" to \" + newState);\n            } else {\n                log.info(\"State transition from {} to {}\", oldState, newState);\n            }\n            state = newState;\n            stateLock.notifyAll();\n        }\n\n        // we need to call the user customized state listener outside the state lock to avoid potential deadlocks\n        if (stateListener != null) {\n            stateListener.onChange(newState, oldState);\n        }\n\n        return true;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Return the current {@link State} of this {@code KafkaStreams} instance.\n     *\n     * @return the current state of this Kafka Streams instance\n     */\n    public State state() {\n        return state;\n    }\n\n    protected boolean isRunningOrRebalancing() {\n        synchronized (stateLock) {\n            return state.isRunningOrRebalancing();\n        }\n    }\n\n    protected boolean hasStartedOrFinishedShuttingDown() {\n        synchronized (stateLock) {\n            return state.hasStartedOrFinishedShuttingDown();\n        }\n    }\n\n    protected void validateIsRunningOrRebalancing() {\n        synchronized (stateLock) {\n            if (state.hasNotStarted()) {\n                throw new StreamsNotStartedException(\"KafkaStreams has not been started, you can retry after calling start()\");\n            }\n            if (!state.isRunningOrRebalancing()) {\n                throw new IllegalStateException(\"KafkaStreams is not running. State is \" + state + \".\");\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Listen to {@link State} change events.\n     */\n    public interface StateListener {\n\n        /**\n         * Called when state changes.\n         *\n         * @param newState new state\n         * @param oldState previous state\n         */\n        void onChange(final State newState, final State oldState);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * An app can set a single {@link KafkaStreams.StateListener} so that the app is notified when state changes.\n     *\n     * @param listener a new state listener\n     * @throws IllegalStateException if this {@code KafkaStreams} instance has already been started.\n     */\n    public void setStateListener(final KafkaStreams.StateListener listener) {\n        synchronized (stateLock) {\n            if (state.hasNotStarted()) {\n                stateListener = listener;\n            } else {\n                throw new IllegalStateException(\"Can only set StateListener before calling start(). Current state is: \" + state);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n\n    /**\n     * Set the handler invoked when an internal {@link StreamsConfig#NUM_STREAM_THREADS_CONFIG stream thread}\n     * throws an unexpected exception.\n     * These might be exceptions indicating rare bugs in Kafka Streams, or they\n     * might be exceptions thrown by your code, for example a NullPointerException thrown from your processor logic.\n     * The handler will execute on the thread that produced the exception.\n     * In order to get the thread that threw the exception, use {@code Thread.currentThread()}.\n     * <p>\n     * Note, this handler must be thread safe, since it will be shared among all threads, and invoked from any\n     * thread that encounters such an exception.\n     *\n     * @param userStreamsUncaughtExceptionHandler the uncaught exception handler of type {@link StreamsUncaughtExceptionHandler} for all internal threads\n     * @throws IllegalStateException if this {@code KafkaStreams} instance has already been started.\n     * @throws NullPointerException if userStreamsUncaughtExceptionHandler is null.\n     */\n    public void setUncaughtExceptionHandler(final StreamsUncaughtExceptionHandler userStreamsUncaughtExceptionHandler) {\n        synchronized (stateLock) {\n            if (state.hasNotStarted()) {\n                Objects.requireNonNull(userStreamsUncaughtExceptionHandler);\n                streamsUncaughtExceptionHandler =\n                    (exception, skipThreadReplacement) ->\n                        handleStreamsUncaughtException(exception, userStreamsUncaughtExceptionHandler, skipThreadReplacement);\n                processStreamThread(thread ->                      exception -> handleStreamsUncaughtException(exception, userStreamsUncaughtExceptionHandler, false)\n                    );\n                }\n                processStreamThread(thread -> thread.setUncaughtExceptionHandler((t, e) -> { }\n                ));\n            } else {\n                throw new IllegalStateException(\"Can only set StreamThread.State.PENDING_SHUTDOWN && hasRunningThread) continue;\n                if (state != StreamThread.State.RUNNING && state != StreamThread.State.DEAD) {\n                    return;\n There are cases\n            // when we don't have a global state thread at all, e.g., when we don't have global KTables\n            if (globalThreadState != null && globalThreadState != GlobalStreamThread.State.RUNNING) {\n                return;\n            }\n\n            setState(State.RUNNING);\n        }\n\n\n        @Override\n        public synchronized void onChange(final Thread thread,\n                                          final ThreadStateTransitionValidator abstractNewState,\n                                          final ThreadStateTransitionValidator abstractOldState) {\n            // StreamThreads first\n            if (thread instanceof StreamThread) {\n                final StreamThread.State newState = (StreamThread.State) abstractNewState;\n                threadState.put(thread.getId(), newState);\n\n                if (newState == StreamThread.State.PARTITIONS_REVOKED || newState == StreamThread.State.PARTITIONS_ASSIGNED) {\n                    setState(State.REBALANCING);\n                } else if (newState == StreamThread.State.RUNNING) {\n                    maybeSetRunning();\n                }\n            } else if (thread instanceof GlobalStreamThread) {\n                // global stream thread has different invariants\n                final GlobalStreamThread.State newState = (GlobalStreamThread.State) abstractNewState;\n                globalThreadState = newState;\n\n                if (newState == GlobalStreamThread.State.RUNNING) {\n                    maybeSetRunning();\n                } else if (newState == GlobalStreamThread.State.DEAD) {\n                    if (state != State.PENDING_SHUTDOWN) {\n                        log.error(\"Global thread has died. The streams application or client will now close to ERROR.\");\n                        closeToError();\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        private synchronized void registerStreamThread(final StreamThread streamThread) {\n            threadState.put(streamThread.getId(), streamThread.state());\n        }\n    }\n\n    static final class DelegatingStateRestoreListener implements StateRestoreListener {\n        private StateRestoreListener userStateRestoreListener;\n\n        private void throwOnFatalException(final Exception fatalUserException,\n                                           final TopicPartition topicPartition,\n                                           final String storeName) {\n            throw new StreamsException(\n                    String.format(\"Fatal user code error in store restore listener for store %s, partition %s.\",\n                            storeName,\n                            topicPartition),\n                    fatalUserException);\n        }\n\n        void setUserStateRestoreListener(final StateRestoreListener userStateRestoreListener) {\n            this.userStateRestoreListener = userStateRestoreListener;\n        }\n","numLines":160,"startLine":540,"totalLines":2154}}}
