* Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more\n * contributor license agreements. See the NOTICE file distributed with\n * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.\n * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0\n * (the \"License\"); you may not use this file except in compliance with\n * the License. You may obtain a copy of the License at\n *\n *    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n *\n * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n * distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n * limitations under the License.\n */\npackage org.apache.kafka.streams.processor.internals;\n\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\nimport org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\n\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.concurrent.CopyOnWriteArrayList;\nimport java.util.concurrent.ThreadLocalRandom;\nimport java.util.concurrent.locks.Condition;\nimport java.util.concurrent.locks.ReentrantLock;\n\n/**\n * Manages authenticated sessions for the metrics transport layer.\n * Sessions have an expiry time and a shard assignment; during rebalancing\n * the shard may change, which triggers listener notifications.\n */\npublic class MetricsSessionManager {\n\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(MetricsSessionManager.class);\n\n    private final ReentrantLock sessionLock = new ReentrantLock();\n    private final Condition sessionReady = sessionLock.newCondition();\n    private final long sessionTtlMs;\n\n    private volatile MetricsSession currentSession;\n    private boolean rebalancingMode = false;\n\n    private final List<MetricsSessionListener> listeners = new CopyOnWriteArrayList<>();\n\n    public MetricsSessionManager(final long sessionTtlMs) {\n        this.sessionTtlMs = sessionTtlMs;\n        this.currentSession = new MetricsSession(\n            \"init-\" + ThreadLocalRandom.current().nextInt(10000),\n            0,\n            System.currentTimeMillis() + sessionTtlMs\n        );\n    }\n\n    public void registerListener(final MetricsSessionListener listener) {\n        listeners.add(listener);\n    }\n\n    public void setRebalancingMode(final boolean rebalancing) {\n        sessionLock.lock();\n        try {\n            this.rebalancingMode = rebalancing;\n            log.debug(\"Metrics session manager rebalancing mode set to {}\", rebalancing);\n        } finally {\n            sessionLock.unlock();\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Returns the current session. The returned reference is safe to read\n     * without holding the lock due to the volatile field, but the session\n     * may expire at any time.\n     */\n    public MetricsSession currentSession() {\n        return currentSession;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * If the current session has expired, renew it.\n     */\n    public void refreshSessionIfExpired() {\n        sessionLock.lock();\n        try {\n            if (currentSession != null && currentSession.expiryMs > System.currentTimeMillis()) {\n                return; // still valid\n            }\n            renewSessionInternal();\n        } finally {\n            sessionLock.unlock();\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Force a session renewal regardless of expiry status.\n     */\n    public void renewSession() {\n        sessionLock.lock();\n        try {\n            renewSessionInternal();\n        } finally {\n            sessionLock.unlock();\n        }\n    }\n\n    private void renewSessionInternal() {\n        final MetricsSession oldSession = currentSession;\n        final int newShardId;\n        if (rebalancingMode) {\n            // During rebalancing, the shard assignment may change\n            newShardId = ThreadLocalRandom.current().nextInt(1024);\n        } else {\n            newShardId = oldSession != null ? oldSession.shardId : 0;\n        }\n\n        final MetricsSession newSession = new MetricsSession(\n            \"sess-\" + ThreadLocalRandom.current().nextInt(100000),\n            newShardId,\n            System.currentTimeMillis() + sessionTtlMs\n        );\n        currentSession = newSession;\n        log.debug(\"Renewed metrics session: old={}, new={}\", oldSession, newSession);\n\n        notifyListeners(oldSession, newSession);\n        sessionReady.signalAll();\n    }\n\n    private void notifyListeners(final MetricsSession oldSession, final MetricsSession newSession) {\n        for (final MetricsSessionListener listener : listeners) {\n            try {\n                listener.onSessionChanged(oldSession, newSession);\n            } catch (final Exception e) {\n                log.warn(\"Metrics session listener threw exception\", e);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Represents an authenticated metrics session with a token, shard\n     * assignment, and expiry timestamp.\n     */\n    public static class MetricsSession {\n        public final String token;\n        public final int shardId;\n        public final long expiryMs;\n\n        public MetricsSession(final String token, final int shardId, final long expiryMs) {\n            this.token = token;\n            this.shardId = shardId;\n            this.expiryMs = expiryMs;\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public String toString() {\n            return \"MetricsSession{token='\" + token + \"', shard=\" + shardId + \", expiry=\" + expiryMs + \"}\";\n        }\n    }\n}\n","numLines":158,"startLine":1,"totalLines":158}}}

during rebalancing\n * the shard may change, which triggers listener notifications.\n */\npublic class MetricsSessionManager {\n\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(MetricsSessionManager.class);\n\n    private final ReentrantLock sessionLock = new ReentrantLock();\n    private final Condition sessionReady = sessionLock.newCondition();\n    private final long sessionTtlMs;\n\n    private volatile MetricsSession currentSession;\n    private boolean rebalancingMode = false;\n\n    private final List<MetricsSessionListener> listeners = new CopyOnWriteArrayList<>();\n\n    public MetricsSessionManager(final long sessionTtlMs) {\n        this.sessionTtlMs = sessionTtlMs;\n        this.currentSession = new MetricsSession(\n            \"init-\" + ThreadLocalRandom.current().nextInt(10000),\n            0,\n            System.currentTimeMillis() + sessionTtlMs\n        );\n    }\n\n    public void registerListener(final MetricsSessionListener listener) {\n        listeners.add(listener);\n    }\n\n    public void setRebalancingMode(final boolean rebalancing) {\n        sessionLock.lock();\n        try {\n            this.rebalancingMode = rebalancing;\n            log.debug(\"Metrics session manager rebalancing mode set to {}\", rebalancing);\n        } finally {\n            sessionLock.unlock();\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Returns the current session. The returned reference is safe to read\n     * without holding the lock due to the volatile field, but the session\n     * may expire at any time.\n     */\n    public MetricsSession currentSession() {\n        return currentSession;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * If the current session has expired, renew it.\n     */\n    public void refreshSessionIfExpired() {\n        sessionLock.lock();\n        try {\n            if (currentSession != null && currentSession.expiryMs > System.currentTimeMillis()) {\n                return; // still valid\n            }\n            renewSessionInternal();\n        } finally {\n            sessionLock.unlock();\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Force a session renewal regardless of expiry status.\n     */\n    public void renewSession() {\n        sessionLock.lock();\n        try {\n            renewSessionInternal();\n        } finally {\n            sessionLock.unlock();\n        }\n    }\n\n    private void renewSessionInternal() {\n        final MetricsSession oldSession = currentSession;\n        final int newShardId;\n        if (rebalancingMode) {\n            // During rebalancing, the shard assignment may change\n            newShardId = ThreadLocalRandom.current().nextInt(1024);\n        } else {\n            newShardId = oldSession != null ? oldSession.shardId : 0;\n        }\n\n        final MetricsSession newSession = new MetricsSession(\n            \"sess-\" + ThreadLocalRandom.current().nextInt(100000),\n            newShardId,\n            System.currentTimeMillis() + sessionTtlMs\n        );\n        currentSession = newSession;\n        log.debug(\"Renewed metrics session: old={}, new={}\", oldSession, newSession);\n\n        notifyListeners(oldSession, newSession);\n        sessionReady.signalAll();\n    }\n\n    private void notifyListeners(final MetricsSession oldSession, final MetricsSession newSession) {\n        for (final MetricsSessionListener listener : listeners) {\n            try {\n                listener.onSessionChanged(oldSession, newSession);\n            } catch (final Exception e) {\n                log.warn(\"Metrics session listener threw exception\", e);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Represents an authenticated metrics session with a token, shard\n     * assignment, and expiry timestamp.\n     */\n    public static class MetricsSession {\n        public final String token;\n        public final int shardId;\n        public final long expiryMs;\n\n        public MetricsSession(final String token, final int shardId, final long expiryMs) {\n            this.token = token;\n            this.shardId = shardId;\n            this.expiryMs = expiryMs;\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public String toString() {\n            return \"MetricsSession{token='\" + token + \"', shard=\" + shardId + \", expiry=\" + expiryMs + \"}\";\n        }\n    }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":79,"oldLines":27,"newStart":79,"newLines":40,"lines":["      * If the current session has expired, renew it.","      */","     public void {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01DMNtbaD2EiaGb7HqyTnwQV","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"thinking","thinking":"The Fray test found a deadlock even with the fix applied. The error is \"Deadlock detected: threads did not complete\". But wait - this is my test's own timeout detection, not Fray's built-in deadlock detection. Let me check if Fray actually detects it as a deadlock or if the threads just didn't complete in time.\n\nActually, looking at the output: \"step: 264693\" - that's a lot of steps. And my test does `join(5000)` which in Fray's controlled execution might not work the same way. Fray's deadlock detection is different - when it detects a deadlock, all threads are blocked. \n\nThe non-zero exit code suggests the deadlock is still happening. Looking back at my fix, I see the real problem: `performMaintenance()` holds the write lock on `transportLock` while calling `refreshSessionIfExpired()`, which means even though I moved the listener notifications outside the `sessionLock`, the `transportLock` is still being held and blocking other threads. So after `refreshSessionIfExpired()` releases `sessionLock`, it then calls `notifyListeners()` while... wait, the `notifyListeners()` call is in `refreshSessionIfExpired()`, not in `performMaintenance()`.\n\nLet me trace through again:\n1. `performMaintenance()` acquires `transportLock` (write)\n2. Calls `validateSession()` → `sessionManager.refreshSessionIfExpired()`\n3. `refreshSessionIfExpired()` acquires `sessionLock`, renews, releases `sessionLock`\n4. THEN calls `notifyListeners()` (outside sessionLock but inside performMaintenance which still holds transportLock)\n5. `notifyListeners()` → `invalidateAll()` → needs `TopologyMetricsCache` monitor\n\nSo Thread A still holds `transportLock` (write) when `notifyListeners` executes, and that's where the problem is. Even though I broke the three-lock cycle, a two-lock deadlock remains: Thread A holds `transportLock` and waits for the `TopologyMetricsCache` monitor, while Thread B holds that monitor and waits for `transportLock`. I need to either release `transportLock` before the callback fires, prevent holding the cache monitor during metric fetches, or find another way to break this cycle. doesn't need `TopologyMetricsCache` monitor\n\nLet me reconsider the best fix. The simplest approach would be to fix `StreamsMetricsConnector.performMaintenance()` so it doesn't hold `transportLock` when calling `sessionManager.refreshSessionIfExpired()`. Or we could fix `validateSession()` to not call `refreshSessionIfExpired()` under the write lock.\n\nActually, looking at this more carefully, the proper fix might be in `StreamsMetricsConnector.validateSession()` - it should not call `sessionManager.refreshSessionIfExpired()` while holding the `transportLock`. The session validation can happen after releasing the transport lock.\n\nAlternatively, we could fix `TopologyMetricsCache.getSnapshot()` to not hold its monitor while calling `fetchLatestMetrics()`.\n\nThe simplest fix that addresses the root cause is to move the `validateSession()` call outside the `transportLock` in `performMaintenance()`, so session refresh doesn't happen while holding the lock.","signature":""}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":653,"cache_read_input_tokens":142200,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":653,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":8,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"57f8f286-c279-42ec-9968-88e72246e88d","uuid":"799f3f73-96f0-47cd-9d71-a3d1b9717be5"}

Fetches topology\n * metric snapshots from the metrics backend and manages the transport\n * connection lifecycle. Extends {@link AbstractMetricsTransport} for\n * read/write lock management around the transport.\n */\npublic class StreamsMetricsConnector extends AbstractMetricsTransport {\n\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(StreamsMetricsConnector.class);\n\n    private final MetricsSessionManager sessionManager;\n    private final ConcurrentHashMap<String, Long> topologyFetchTimestamps = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();\n\n    private volatile boolean transportValid = true;\n\n    public StreamsMetricsConnector(final MetricsSessionManager sessionManager) {\n        this.sessionManager = sessionManager;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Fetches the latest metrics for the given topology. If the transport\n     * connection is stale, refreshes it before fetching.\n     *\n     * @param topologyName the name of the topology to fetch metrics for\n     * @return a map of metric name to value\n     */\n    public Map<String, Double> fetchLatestMetrics(final String topologyName) {\n        acquireShared();\n        try {\n            if (isTransportValid()) {\n                // Fast path: transport is healthy, fetch under read lock\n                topologyFetchTimestamps.computeIfAbsent(topologyName, k -> System.currentTimeMillis());\n                return doFetch(topologyName);\n            }\n        } finally {\n            releaseShared();\n        }\n\n        // Slow path: transport is stale, need exclusive access to refresh\n        return refreshTransport(topologyName);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Refreshes the transport connection and then fetches metrics.\n     */\n    private Map<String, Double> refreshTransport(final String topologyName) {\n        acquireExclusive();\n        try {\n            log.debug(\"Refreshing stale metrics transport before fetching {}\", topologyName);\n            doDisconnect();\n            doConnect();\n            lastConnectTimeMs = System.currentTimeMillis();\n            transportValid = true;\n            return doFetch(topologyName);\n        } finally {\n            releaseExclusive();\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Performs periodic transport maintenance, reconnecting if the\n     * transport has gone stale and revalidating the current session.\n     */\n    public void performMaintenance() {\n        acquireExclusive();\n        try {\n            log.debug(\"Performing metrics transport maintenance\");\n            if (!isTransportValid()) {\n                doDisconnect();\n                doConnect();\n                lastConnectTimeMs = System.currentTimeMillis();\n                transportValid = true;\n            }\n            validateSession();\n        } finally {\n            releaseExclusive();\n        }\n    }\n\n    private void validateSession() {\n        final MetricsSessionManager.MetricsSession session = sessionManager.currentSession();\n        if (session == null || session.expiryMs <= System.currentTimeMillis()) {\n            log.debug(\"Current metrics session expired, requesting refresh\");\n            sessionManager.refreshSessionIfExpired();\n        }\n    }\n\n    private Map<String, Double> doFetch(final String topologyName) {\n        // In a real implementation this would query the metrics backend\n        topologyFetchTimestamps.put(topologyName, System.currentTimeMillis());\n        return Collections.emptyMap();\n    }\n\n    public void markTransportInvalid() {\n        this.transportValid = false;\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    protected void doConnect() {\n        log.debug(\"Connecting metrics transport\");\n        transportValid = true;\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    protected void doDisconnect() {\n        log.debug(\"Disconnecting metrics transport\");\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    protected boolean isTransportValid() {\n        return transportValid;\n    }\n}\n","numLines":139,"startLine":1,"totalLines":139}}}
